title: Test DeepSeek and Gemini API connectivity and log results
job:
This is a provider connectivity test. Run two quick tests and report results to `logs/provider-test.md`:

**Test 1 — DeepSeek (custom provider)**
Make a curl call to `https://api.deepseek.com/v1/chat/completions` using the `$CUSTOM_API_KEY` environment variable with model `deepseek-chat`. Send a simple message: "Say hello in exactly 5 words." Report whether it succeeded and what it returned.

**Test 2 — Google Gemini Flash**
Make a curl call to the Google Gemini API using `$GOOGLE_API_KEY` with model `gemini-2.0-flash`. Send the same message: "Say hello in exactly 5 words." Report whether it succeeded and what it returned.

Save a clear pass/fail result for each test to `logs/provider-test.md`.
